rooms.name: The Hearth
rooms.openingCopy: Every relationship begins with the question of safety. This week we explore what it means to belong — and what makes it feel possible or impossible for you.
rooms.weeklyFocus: Where do you feel most relationally at home, and what conditions make that possible?

pathwayOverlay.discover: Explore belonging as an internal experience — what it feels like in your body and mind when you are truly at home with yourself and others.
pathwayOverlay.relate: Explore how belonging shows up in your closest relationships — what creates safety with specific people, and what disrupts it.
pathwayOverlay.harmonize: Explore how you and your partner co-create a sense of home — the rituals, signals, and dynamics between you that build or erode safety.

signalPhrases: I always feel like an outsider
inquiryEntryHints: I felt rejected
I felt like I didn't fit
I feel like I don't belong here

rooms.name: The Mirror
rooms.openingCopy: We carry patterns into every relationship — ways of showing up that feel automatic, even inevitable. This week we look at those patterns with honest curiosity.
rooms.weeklyFocus: What do you notice about how you behave when you feel unseen or misunderstood?

pathwayOverlay.discover: Turn the mirror inward. What patterns do you observe when you watch yourself in relationship without judgment?
pathwayOverlay.relate: How do your patterns affect the specific people you are close to? What do others reflect back to you about how you show up?
pathwayOverlay.harmonize: What patterns exist between you as a couple? What does your dynamic reveal about each of you, and about what you create together?

inquiryEntryHints: I always react this way
I don't know why I do this
I can't seem to stop
I don't understand my own reaction

rooms.name: The Garden
rooms.openingCopy: What feeds your relationships — and what depletes them? This week we explore the conditions under which connection flourishes for you.
rooms.weeklyFocus: What does a relationship need to give you energy rather than drain it?

pathwayOverlay.discover: What nourishes you as an individual? Explore the internal conditions — emotional, physical, creative — that allow you to show up fully.
pathwayOverlay.relate: What do your relationships need to thrive? Explore what sustains connection with the people most important to you.
pathwayOverlay.harmonize: What does your partnership need to stay alive and growing? Explore the daily and weekly rhythms that nourish or neglect your bond.

signalPhrases: I give more than I get
inquiryEntryHints: this relationship exhausts me
I don't know what I need
I feel empty after

rooms.name: The Compass
rooms.openingCopy: Our values are the invisible architecture behind our choices. This week we make them visible — and explore how they shape who we want to be in relationship.
rooms.weeklyFocus: When your values and your behaviour are misaligned, what does that feel like — and what does it cost you?

pathwayOverlay.discover: What do you stand for? Explore the values that feel non-negotiable in how you want to live and relate.
pathwayOverlay.relate: How do your values show up — or fail to show up — in your most important relationships? Where is there alignment, and where is there friction?
pathwayOverlay.harmonize: What values do you and your partner share? Where do your values diverge, and how do you navigate that?

signalPhrases: I don't know what I stand for
inquiryEntryHints: I felt like I betrayed myself
I don't know what matters to me anymore
I did something that didn't feel like me

rooms.name: The Pulse
rooms.openingCopy: Attraction is more than physical. It is the pull toward something that mirrors or complements something inside us. This week we explore what draws us — and why.
rooms.weeklyFocus: What qualities do you find yourself drawn to, and what does that pattern reveal about what you are seeking?

pathwayOverlay.discover: What draws your attention and energy in general? Explore the qualities — in people, ideas, experiences — that create aliveness in you.
pathwayOverlay.relate: What have you been drawn to in significant relationships? Explore the threads that connect the people who have mattered most to you.
pathwayOverlay.harmonize: What still draws you toward your partner — and what has shifted? Explore the energy between you with honesty and curiosity.

inquiryEntryHints: I notice I'm developing feelings
something is shifting between us
I keep thinking about them
I don't understand this attraction

rooms.name: The Shadow
rooms.openingCopy: Our triggers are not obstacles to relationship — they are invitations. This week we look at what activates us most strongly, and what it is asking us to understand.
rooms.weeklyFocus: When you are triggered in a relationship, what is the story your nervous system tells — and how old is that story?

pathwayOverlay.discover: What activates you most reliably? Explore the fears and sensitivities that live beneath your reactions.
pathwayOverlay.relate: What triggers you in close relationships specifically? Explore the dynamic between your wound and the other person's presence.
pathwayOverlay.harmonize: Where do you and your partner trigger each other? Explore the recurring activation patterns in your dynamic — with compassion for both of you.

signalPhrases: I can't explain why I reacted
inquiryEntryHints: something triggered me and I don't understand it
my reaction was bigger than the situation
I don't know where that came from

rooms.name: The Forge
rooms.openingCopy: Conflict is not the enemy of connection — rupture without repair is. This week we look at how we fight, how we retreat, and how we find our way back.
rooms.weeklyFocus: In conflict, do you tend to move toward, away, or against — and what does that cost you and the relationship?

pathwayOverlay.discover: How do you relate to conflict in general? Explore your instinctive responses — fight, flight, freeze, fawn — and where they originate.
pathwayOverlay.relate: How do your conflict patterns play out in your significant relationships? Who initiates, who withdraws, who repairs — and how?
pathwayOverlay.harmonize: How do you and your partner handle conflict together? Explore the cycle you fall into, and what a different path might look like.

inquiryEntryHints: we can't seem to repair
I don't know how to come back after conflict
I can't apologize even when I want to

rooms.name: The Vision
rooms.openingCopy: Having seen yourself more clearly, what do you want to build? This week we move from awareness to intention — from understanding the past to designing what comes next.
rooms.weeklyFocus: What would a relationship built consciously around your deepest values and needs actually look like?

pathwayOverlay.discover: What kind of life — and what kind of relationships — are you building toward? Explore your vision for who you are becoming.
pathwayOverlay.relate: What do you want to create in your most important relationships going forward? Explore what intentional connection looks like for you.
pathwayOverlay.harmonize: What is the shared vision for your partnership? Explore what you are building together — the relationship you are consciously choosing to create.

inquiryEntryHints: I want something different
I know what I need to do now
I'm ready to commit to

rooms.name: The Gathering
rooms.openingCopy: You’ve moved through the journey. Now we gather what has actually changed — what is clearer, what is real, and what you’re beginning to carry differently.
rooms.weeklyFocus: What has genuinely shifted in how you understand yourself and your way of relating?

pathwayOverlay.discover: What has become clearer about who you are and how you move through connection?
pathwayOverlay.relate: What has shifted in the way you show up in your relationships?
pathwayOverlay.harmonize: What is becoming more visible about the dynamic you create together?

inquiryEntryHints: I understand myself differently now
this week changed how I see things
I didn't see this before

rooms.name: The Becoming
rooms.openingCopy: This is not an ending. It’s the moment you begin to live what you’ve seen — to carry it into how you choose, respond, and relate going forward.
rooms.weeklyFocus: What will you actually live differently after this journey?

pathwayOverlay.discover: What will you now practice in your relationship with yourself?
pathwayOverlay.relate: What will you do differently in how you relate to others?
pathwayOverlay.harmonize: What will you intentionally build or sustain together from here?

inquiryEntryHints: I want to do this differently now
I'm committing to change
this is what I'm taking forward
